title: hephestionia strigosa
intro: Hephestionia strigosa, also known as Striga, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hephestionia strigosa include its ability to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to make topical creams and ointments.
